channel.title: Linkedin-Insights on David Gomez - Technology & Business Insights
channel.description: Recent content in Linkedin-Insights on David Gomez - Technology & Business Insights

item.title: DevOps Team Struggles with Security Compliance
item.description:
LinkedIn Insights: DevOps Team Struggles with Security Compliance

Originally shared by Mike Rodriguez (DevOps Engineer at GrowthCo) on LinkedIn

View original LinkedIn post →

The Challenge

Mike Rodriguez’s LinkedIn post resonated with many technology professionals because it addresses a common challenge:

Our DevOps team spent weeks trying to implement proper security monitoring. The challenge wasn’t technical - it was knowing where to start. We needed a framework that balanced security with development speed.

item.title: Startup Founder's Dilemma: Build vs Buy for Infrastructure
item.description:
LinkedIn Insights: Startup Founder’s Dilemma: Build vs Buy for Infrastructure

Originally shared by Alex Kim (Founder at StartupXYZ) on LinkedIn

View original LinkedIn post →

The Challenge

Alex Kim’s LinkedIn post resonated with many technology professionals because it addresses a common challenge:

As a technical founder, I constantly debate whether to build infrastructure in-house or use managed services. The math is clear: managed services win 90% of the time when you factor in opportunity cost.

item.title: Why Our Startup Reduced AWS Costs by 60%
item.description:
LinkedIn Insights: Why Our Startup Reduced AWS Costs by 60%

Originally shared by Sarah Chen (CTO at TechStartup) on LinkedIn

View original LinkedIn post →

The Challenge

Sarah Chen’s LinkedIn post resonated with many technology professionals because it addresses a common challenge:

After months of ballooning cloud costs, we implemented a comprehensive AWS optimization strategy. The results were dramatic: 60% cost reduction while improving performance. Key changes included right-sizing instances, implementing auto-scaling, and moving to spot instances for non-critical workloads.
